attempted_route: pandas boolean masking on Quality/target_id/type_Ki/type_KD/organism columns; protein_set merged via pd.DataFrame.merge on target_id; temporary _organism/_org_lower columns dropped before pd.to_pickle
observation: exec exit_code=0, 336 rows saved; eval scored 0/336 — evaluator shows each predicted row lacks Classification and Organism columns present in every expected row
rationale: The script merged protein_set onto filtered rows solely to apply organism filter, then dropped all joined columns including Classification and Organism. The ground-truth pickle retains these columns, causing a schema mismatch that makes every row fail evaluation.
recommended_alternative: After filtering on organism, do NOT drop the Classification and Organism columns from the merged DataFrame. Keep them by removing only internal temp columns (_org_lower); call filtered.drop(columns=['_org_lower'], inplace=True) and retain '_organism' renamed to 'Organism' via DataFrame.rename, then pd.to_pickle to pred_results/papyrus_filtered.pkl.
